name: Cash Loans
description_short: AmeriCash Loans offers installment loans up to $2,500 with a fast application process at their Spartanburg, SC location just off I-29.
description_long:
AmeriCash Loans operates a physical lending location in Spartanburg, South Carolina, positioned as a quick-turnaround personal loan provider. The company focuses on delivering fast cash through streamlined application procedures, emphasizing speed and convenience for borrowers in the local community. Their Spartanburg branch is strategically located off I-29 on East Main Street, across from Ross, serving nearby neighborhoods including Zion Hill, Drayton, Whitney Heights, and Hillbrook.

The company's primary offering is installment loans with a maximum loan amount of $2,500. Their marketing emphasizes the ability to get funded "in just minutes" through their fast loan application process. They maintain in-person service with dedicated customer service representatives available during business hours to assist applicants. Operating hours span Monday through Friday 9 am to 6 pm and Saturday 9 am to 2 pm, with Sunday closures.

AmeriCash distinguishes itself through physical branch accessibility and rapid turnaround times compared to purely online lenders. Their location near major traffic corridors (I-29) and established retail areas suggests an accessible storefront model. The company appears to target borrowers who value immediate in-person service and quick funding over online alternatives.

The website provides limited detail on loan terms, APR rates, credit requirements, or repayment structures. The maximum loan amount of $2,500 places this firmly in the small personal loan category rather than larger consolidation lending. No information is available regarding credit score minimums, debt-to-income requirements, or specific use case guidelines, making full assessment of their lending criteria impossible from available sources.
pros: Fast application process with same-day or near-immediate funding according to marketing
In-person service with dedicated customer service representatives available
Convenient physical location off I-29 with nearby parking (across from Ross retail)
Extended hours including Saturday service (9 am-2 pm) for working customers
Serves multiple nearby neighborhoods and communities in Spartanburg area
Loan amounts up to $2,500 available without requiring larger debt consolidation
Established local presence with dedicated Spartanburg branch
cons: Loan maximum of $2,500 is limited for larger financial needs or debt consolidation
Website lacks transparency on APR rates, fees, and complete loan terms
No information provided about minimum credit score requirements or approval criteria
Limited online presence and no apparent online application option mentioned
Sunday closures may inconvenience weekend-focused borrowers
best_for: Borrowers needing $500-$2,500 in cash quickly for emergencies or immediate expenses
Spartanburg and nearby residents who prefer in-person lending with same-day service
Customers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans seeking accessible alternatives
diagnosis: AmeriCash Loans is best suited for Spartanburg-area residents needing quick access to $500-$2,500 in personal funds through in-person service. The primary caveat is the lack of published pricing transparency (APR, fees) and the modest $2,500 maximum loan amount, which limits utility for larger financial needs.
services: Fast loan application and approval process
Local branch service in Spartanburg, SC

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Personal Cash Loans of SC, Inc.
